summary: Iteration 3 (Awwwards-level UX upgrade) — full backend + frontend regression PASSED. Backend pytest 22/22 (no regression). Frontend: Preloader renders on fresh visit and exits within ~2s (sessionStorage gate works, skipped on /admin), CustomCursor renders 2 mix-blend-difference fixed divs + html.custom-cursor-on class on desktop, ScrollProgress bar present with correct testid + gradient, FluidGradient visible on Hero (purple+orange/gold mesh confirmed via screenshot), 2 MarqueeDividers on HomePage rendering with large display text, Footer signature 'Let's build something undeniable.' renders with 'undeniable.' in gradient gold italic (also reused as Contact page header), admin login works (admin@id9agency.com / ID9_Admin_2025!), EN/FR lang toggle works (Accueil/Home), contact form submits successfully (success card 'Brief received.' shown), all WhatsApp links point to https://wa.me/50931634848, all 6 public routes (/, /about, /services, /portfolio, /blog, /contact) load with 0 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Preloader (Preloader.jsx) correctly uses sessionStorage gate ('id9_preloaded') and short-circuits via isAdmin guard. document.documentElement.style.overflow is properly cleaned up on unmount.
CustomCursor uses (pointer: coarse) media query — touch devices correctly bypass; html.custom-cursor-on class toggled and removed on cleanup. mouseover listener uses .closest() which scales fine.

ScrollProgress uses framer-motion useScroll+useSpring on scrollYProgress — clean implementation. Note: with Lenis smooth-scroll, scrollYProgress reads from window.scrollY which Lenis updates synchronously, so this works. Transform measured as scaleX=0 immediately after route change is expected (spring resetting).

MarqueeDivider duplicates items x3 for seamless ticker; CSS @keyframes ticker should be defined globally (assumed in index.css). Visual confirmation: 'Brand ● Web ● Motion ●' marquee renders correctly in screenshot.
FluidGradient (replacing GlowOrbs in HeroSection) delivers premium mesh feel — purple+orange/gold blobs clearly visible in hero screenshot.

Footer signature 'Let's build something undeniable.' renders at large clamp() typography on both Footer and Contact page header — minor: same copy appears in two places, which is intentional (theme repetition) but worth noting for content audit.
Contact form data-testid naming uses pattern 'contact-input-*' / 'contact-submit' (not 'contact-form-*') — established in prior iterations. Documenting for future test authors.
i18n + admin + contact submission flows unchanged and working (Iter 1 & 2 regression confirmed).
No console errors across all 6 public routes — clean implementation.
seed_data_creation: None. Contact form created one TEST_ submission via /api/contact (visible in admin).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact form testids are 'contact-input-name', 'contact-input-email', 'contact-input-message', 'contact-submit' (NOT 'contact-form-*'). Success element after submit: 'contact-success-whatsapp'. Preloader can be skipped in E2E by calling sessionStorage.setItem('id9_preloaded','1') BEFORE goto. Lenis smooth-scroll is enabled — for scroll assertions, use page.evaluate('window.scrollTo(...)') and wait ~800ms for spring to settle. Custom cursor adds 'custom-cursor-on' class on <html> on desktop only. All 22 backend pytest tests still green; rerun via: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_id9_backend.py -v
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in iteration 3.
